title: DIMCP EP_09 pt1 season1 Brenny's Mansion

transcript:
[00:00:00.00] So Nusya has come to light.
[00:00:03.00] Brenny lives in a mansion.
[00:00:11.00] As you can see,
[00:00:14.00] she lives in a mansion on Olive Street.
[00:00:20.00] Apparently she likes corn beef and tea.
[00:00:25.00] So,
[00:00:27.00] that's the way
[00:00:29.00] the cookie crumbles.
[00:00:33.00] Alright.
[00:00:35.00] We'll call back later.
[00:00:37.00] Dog is my co-pilot.
